title: Identity Match Response
description: Response indicating which packages the user is eligible for. The ttl_sec field defines a caching contract: the router caches this response and serves at most one ad per eligible package within the TTL window.

request_id.description: Echoed request identifier from the identity match request

eligible_package_ids.description: Package IDs the user is eligible for. Packages not listed are ineligible.

ttl_sec.description: How long the router should cache this response, in seconds. During this window, the router serves at most one ad per eligible package without re-querying the buyer.
